provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: Subject to Subsections 9(2) and 9(3), the following developments are exempt from the requirement to obtain a development permit:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: accessory structures that are 20.0 square metres of floor area or less, unless used as a backyard suite use;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: kiosks that are 20.0 square metres of floor area or less and shipping containers within the Dartmouth Waterfront

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3A, and the Halifax Waterfront (HW) Special Area, as shown on Schedule 3B;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: excluding foundations, piles, and footings, uncovered structures less than 0.6 metre in height, such as balconies and patios;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: home office uses;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: temporary uses;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: fences;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: the construction, replacement, or repair of infrastructure by utilities or municipal, provincial, or federal governments;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: public transit shelters;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: any sign exempted under Section 458;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: monument uses on municipally, provincially, or federally owned land;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: excluding main buildings on registered heritage properties, the painting of buildings;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: the replacement of windows and doors within existing openings;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: urban farm uses;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: the keeping of egg-laying hens as an accessory use; and

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: the keeping of bees as an accessory use.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: A short-term rental of an entire dwelling unit in an operator's primary residence is exempt from the requirement to obtain a development permit; (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: Provided the rental is not a short-term bedroom rental, a rental of 3 or fewer bedrooms in a dwelling unit shall not require a development permit; (RC-Feb 21/23;E-Sep 1/23)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: an internal conversion of a building with a commercial use in a DD or DH zone that existed before November 27, 2019 to a multi-unit dwelling use. (RC-May23/24;E-Jun 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: On a registered heritage property or on a lot within a heritage conservation district, the following structures are not exempt from a development permit:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: uncovered structures less than 0.6 metre in height, such as balconies and patios; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: fences.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Permit Development Permit Exemptions
provisions.text: Even where a development permit is not required, a development shall meet all applicable requirements contained in this By-law. Development Permit Applications

sections.title_label_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: A development permit application shall include documents and plans, drawn to scale, that include the following, where applicable:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: floor plans with dimensions shown and the intended use of all rooms labelled;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: elevation drawings with:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: height measurements and dimensions shown for all sides of proposed structures,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: external cladding material type and detail labelled, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: any architectural details where required;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: roof plans;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: a site plan showing:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: lot dimensions and lot lines,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location of all existing and proposed structures and uses,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: setbacks,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location and dimensions of all parking lots, parking spaces, driveways, driving aisles, off-street loading spaces, and parking lot entrances and exits,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location and dimensions of all pedestrian walks and walkways,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location of hard landscaping or soft landscaping, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location of solid waste management areas;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: where a watercourse, or a wetland that is contiguous to a watercourse, exists and is located on the lot where a development is being proposed or within 60.0 metres of the lot where a development is being proposed, a site plan which shows the following:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location of any watercourse,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location of any wetland that is contiguous to a watercourse,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the required watercourse buffer,

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: existing vegetation limits, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: land contours with lot grading information, certified by a surveyor or professional engineer;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location of all wetlands within or adjacent to the lot where a development is being proposed;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location of bicycle parking areas;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location of building utilities;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: the location of all exterior lighting;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: excluding height-exempted building rooftop features under Section 103, for a building or an addition to a building that results in a building greater than 20.0 metres in height:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: a pedestrian wind impact assessment report that meets the protocol and performance standards contained in Appendix 1, and is prepared by a professional engineer, and

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: if the pedestrian wind impact assessment report recommends on-site wind mitigation measures, then the measures that are recommended must be implemented in the design and construction of the building;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: excluding buildings 11.0 metres in height or less, or any development in any ER- 3, ER-2, ER-1, CH-2, CH-1, PCF, or RPK zone, a shadow study and shadow diagrams that meet the requirements of Appendix 2, for:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: any new building or addition to a building located within 100 metres of any identified area on Schedule 51, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: any new building or addition to a building that results in a building height greater than 30.0 metres, which is located further than 100 metres of an identified area on Schedule 51; (RC-May 23/24;E- June 13/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: to ensure compliance with the view plane, Halifax Citadel rampart sight line, or waterfront view corridor requirements of Part X, site plans or elevation drawings that are certified by a surveyor;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: excluding any developments located within the ER-3, ER- 2, ER-1, CH-2, or CH-1 zone, a landscape plan that meets the requirements of Section 430, for:

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: a new building equal to or greater than 2,000 square metres, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: an addition equal to or greater than 1,000 square metres;

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: approval from the Government of Canada for infill of a water lot in the Northwest Arm Special Area or the Dartmouth Cove Special Area (RC-Oct 7/25;E-Dec 3/25); and (RC-Jan 9/24;E-Feb 12/24)

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit application shall include documents and plans,
provisions.text: any other information that the Development Officer requires to determine if the development complies with this By-law. Approval

sections.title_label_raw: The Development Officer shall issue a development permit where the

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer shall issue a development permit where the
provisions.text: The Development Officer shall issue a development permit where the development meets:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer shall issue a development permit where the
provisions.text: the requirements of this By-law;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer shall issue a development permit where the
provisions.text: the terms of an approved site plan; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer shall issue a development permit where the
provisions.text: the terms of an approved development agreement. Expiry

sections.title_label_raw: A development permit shall expire 24 months from the date it is

provisions.heading_context_raw: A development permit shall expire 24 months from the date it is
provisions.text: A development permit shall expire 24 months from the date it is issued. Revocation

sections.title_label_raw: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:
provisions.text: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:
provisions.text: the development is not in accordance with:

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:
provisions.text: this By-law,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:
provisions.text: the plans associated with the approved development permit,

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:
provisions.text: an approved site plan, or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:
provisions.text: an approved development agreement;

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:
provisions.text: the permit was issued based on incorrect information provided by the applicant when applying for a development permit; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: The Development Officer may revoke a development permit if:
provisions.text: the permit was issued in error. Fees

sections.title_label_raw: The fees for applications under this By-law shall be set out by

provisions.heading_context_raw: The fees for applications under this By-law shall be set out by
provisions.text: The fees for applications under this By-law shall be set out by Administrative Order.
